---
title: Arkose Paris 14
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784557464/arkose_20220508_qez0zk.png
description: Salle d'escalade Arkose Paris 14
categories: [urbansketch]
date: 2022/05/08
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784557464/arkose_20220508_qez0zk.png)


::: {.visually-hidden}
{{< meta description >}}
:::
